state.title: QCViz-MCP v3
state.chat_text:
Welcome to QCViz-MCP v3. I can run quantum
                    chemistry calculations using PySCF with Gemini AI planning.
                    Ask me to compute energies, optimize geometries, visualize
                    orbitals and ESP maps. Supports Korean input and ion pairs.

messages.text:
Welcome to QCViz-MCP v3. I can run quantum
                    chemistry calculations using PySCF with Gemini AI planning.
                    Ask me to compute energies, optimize geometries, visualize
                    orbitals and ESP maps. Supports Korean input and ion pairs.

Plan: orbital_preview | structure=acetone | method=B3LYP | basis=def2-SVP | orbital=HOMO | confidence=0.95 | via=heuristic{
